name: ALB HTTP to HTTPS Redirect
description: Ensures Application Load Balancers redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS
query: SELECT _cq_id AS id, load_balancer_arn, port, protocol FROM aws_lb_listeners WHERE protocol = 'HTTP' AND NOT (default_actions ILIKE '%"Type": "redirect"%' AND default_actions ILIKE '%"Protocol": "HTTPS"%')
remediation: Configure HTTP listeners to redirect to HTTPS. Add a redirect action on port 80 listeners.
